title: <task> Create a Codex Plugin integration into the FUGUE lane-bridge system. This involves creating one new file and modifying two existing files in ~/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/. The goal: integrate codex-companion.mjs as a first-class provider in the FUGUE lane-bridge, so FUGUE can...
summary_text: Created [delegate-codex-plugin.js](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/delegate-codex-plugin.js#L1) as the new ESM adapter. It resolves the latest `codex-companion.mjs`, reads `codexPlugin.timeout` from `quality-gates.json`, supports `--auto-context`, uses `execFile`, applies `lib/output-filter.js` when available, maps the requested agents to plugin subcommands, formats review output into the required `Score/Verdict/Findings/Summary` shape, and passes task-agent stdout through directly. Updated [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L52) to register `codex-plugin`, added the `codex-plugin -> codex` failover in [fugue-lane-bridge.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/fugue-lane-bridge.mjs#L200), and switched review preference in [phase-runner.mjs](/Users/masayuki/.claude/skills/orchestra-delegator/scripts/lib/phase-runner.mjs#L125). Verification passed as requested: - `node --check` passed for all three files. - `node .../delegate-codex-plugin.js --help` exited `0`. - `node .../delegate-codex-plugin.js -a code-reviewer -t "test" -p /tmp` parsed correctly and failed only for the expected runtime reason: `/tmp` is not a Git repo. One runtime note: executing this `.js` ESM file emits Node’s `[MODULE_TYPELESS_PACKAGE_JSON]` warning because that directory tree has no local `package.json` with `"type": "module"`. It does not affect the checks or adapter behavior.
